name: Category 28: Email Campaigns
description: Email marketing automation and campaign management

automations.name: Welcome Sequence Builder
automations.description: Auto-sends welcome email series to new subscribers

automations.name: Nurture Campaign Manager
automations.description: Manages multi-touch nurture campaigns with delays

automations.name: List Hygiene Automation
automations.description: Removes bounces, unsubscribes, and inactive contacts

automations.name: Subject Line A/B Tester
automations.description: Tests subject lines and auto-sends winner to rest

automations.name: Segmentation Engine
automations.description: Auto-segments lists by behavior, purchase history, etc

automations.name: Lifecycle Trigger Manager
automations.description: Sends emails based on lifecycle events

automations.name: Campaign Performance Reporter
automations.description: Tracks and reports campaign metrics automatically
